Added_Other.mechanism: Phases out the old method of selecting assets in the toolbox for a more streamlined approach.
Added_Other.purpose: Simplifies the asset selection process for developers, making it easier to find and use assets.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUGCValidateMeshBBoxIsCentered
Added_Other.mechanism: Checks if the bounding box of user-generated content (UGC) meshes is centered correctly.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that player-created items look right and are positioned properly in the game.

Added_Other.name: FFlagUGCValidateMeshBBoxMinSize
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a check to ensure user-generated content (UGC) meshes meet minimum size requirements.
Added_Other.purpose: Prevents the upload of excessively small meshes, ensuring better quality and usability in games.
